LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALEX CHIN'S CONSOLIDATED MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF DEFENDANT COLE HAAN, LLCS PERSONS MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO JULY 14, 2017 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMETN 302 TO GIVE THE PARTIES AN OPPORTUNITY TO ENGAGE IN MEANINGFUL MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS TO AGREE ON A NARROWED BUT SUFFICIENTLY COMPREHENSIVE SCOPE OF THE PMK TOPICS TO ENABLE PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN PERTINENT INFORMATION RELATING TO CLASS CERTIFICATION ISSUES. NO LATER THAN JULY 12, 2017 COUNSEL FOR THE PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO MEET IN PERSON AT A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE LOCATION (OR, IF THEY CANNOT AGREE, AT THE CENTURY CITY OFFICE OF COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS). IF THE FIRST MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS ARE NOT SUCCESSFUL, COUNSEL MUST CONTINUE THOSE EFFORTS BY MEETING OUTSIDE DEPARTMENT 302 ON JULY 14, 2017 AT 9AM. IF THE PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO RESOLVE THEIR DIFFERENCES OR AT LEAST SIGNIFICANTLY REDUCE THEIR DIFFERENCES, THE COURT WILL LIKELY APPOINT A DISCOVERY REFEREE AT THE HEARING ON JULY 14.
